ipAllowlistDescription: Add every address below to your Flutterwave live IP allowlist. Capisum calls Flutterwave from these static outbound IPs.
transfersNote: Enable transfers on your Flutterwave account before payouts can work. Contact Flutterwave support if API / direct transfers are not yet enabled for your business.
reviewConfirmation: I've whitelisted these Capisum IPs in Flutterwave
